title: All New Nik Coppin
description: The globetrotting comedian brings a hilarious show consisting of jovial banter along with fun, interesting & inventive new material and invites the audience to judge it. It could be good, it could be bad. It could be great. But either way, it will be a lot of fun. "Could Nik Coppin be any more spectacular? Fast paced, witty, fun and amazing, all without any pretension." ★★★★★ (Melbourne International Comedy Festival) "Fast and funny...The audience loved it...Sweetly, wildly hilarious" ★★★★ (Rip It Up, Adelaide Fringe) "Fun and amazing" ★★★★ (Melbourne International Comedy Festival) "Kept the 20-strong audience laughing like a crowd of hundreds with his geographical jibes and swift-witted rapport-building" (Clothesline, Adelaide Fringe) "He talks at 100mph and generates an irresistible atmosphere of good old-fashioned fun" (Chortle.co.uk, Edinburgh Fringe)
